creator: dpelleg+bsd@cs.cmu.edu
text:
sysinstall "disklabel editor" shows two columns for created partitions.
If there are more than 7, it start showing the 8th and above on the
right-hand column. If softupdates is selected for any partition on
the right-hand side, the "S" for it will be displayed on the leftmost
column of the next line (where it doesn't belong).
